pages.text: Be exposed to radiation to have a chance of becoming a mutant.$(br2)Renewal:$(br)Just when your at your lowest your body start regenerating at a fast pace. It takes up a lot of power so you can only do it again after 120 seconds.$(br2)Bone claws:$(br)You can grow out your claws, giving you an great weapon.
By injecting yourself with adamantium you can upgrade your durability and claws.
